Flaming Sword of Xuzl  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetWizS12L059Sword

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 250 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 0.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Conjures a flaming sword that attacks your target until either it, or the target, is dead.

Items with this effect

  • Amulet of Xuzl
  • Fabled Amulet of Xuzl
  • Spell: Flaming Sword of Xuzl

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Flaming Sword of Xuzl
ClassLevel
WIZ59
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (21)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (16)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
effective?
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2022 at 7:22 AM Rating: Good
Sippin
Sage
3,058 posts
Tested this on Agnarr, (65 level max) on a wavecrasher in Paw. They self-heal so if only the tank engages this mob can be up a long time.

Three wizards in group and they all cast this once tank got aggro. These pets die instantly if they get aggro otherwise they appear to last forever.

Over the course of the fight the three swords did 5025, 4269 and 3819 points of damage. One wizard is max aa and the other two only have around 50 so this may account for the differences.

Max hit was between 70-90.

Average hit 52-54.

DPS was 16-20.

For 250 mana, obviously a very efficient spell... IF the fight lasts this long. Which normally would only be boss and mini-boss fights. I dragged this one out. In a typical Paw fight, the mana efficiency would be inferior to a wizard just casting a regular nuke. This is effectively a dot so you can pile it onto nukes. But I rarely dot in Paw since mobs die too fast for anything but a mana-free clicky dot to be efficient and, even then, given the cast time of most clickies, it's still not worth it (unless out of mana) since you can use that cast time for a real nuke.

Get the clicky from Vex Thal and this really gets effective. But I've never seen that drop of many VT raids.*

*On reconsideration, that has a 10s cast time. The spell is close to instant. Unless wizzy is OOM, the clicky isn't worth the effort or the dkp, I think.,

Edited, Dec 14th 2022 8:23am by Sippin
____________________________
Sippin 115 DRU **** Firiona Vie ****Agnarr
FV: 115 WAR ENC CLE MAG WIZ SHD SHM Master Alchemist ROG Master Tinkerer & Poison-Maker
Master Artisan (300+) * Baker * Brewer * Fletcher * Jeweler * Potter * Researcher * Smith * Tailor
Agnarr: 65 DRU ENC SHD MAG CLE ROG WIZ BRD WAR PAL BST RNG MNK

▲ Page top
GIVE ME A BREAK PLEASE SONY
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2005 at 6:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591840113498
View User Forum
5 posts
Ok guys, ya know I have not really said much here in the posts. Finally I have to say something about this spell. I mean it sounds really cool and all, but what is up? I mean did they run out of ideas for places for spells to drop? Old Seb, and Skyfire. What happend did someone at a Sony board meeting say hey I really don't like Wizzy's so lets really put the screws to them. Its not only this spell but is the whole set of spells at 59th level. I mean ONE of these is not research or drop. Those that are drop are so freaking rare you might as well be trying to get your epic. I personaly think that the whole list of spells of this level HURLS! I have not really seen anything that would do over 1k yet listed, up till now. I know that there are items and AA's to boos this number but PLEASE even invert Gravity sux. I mean I felt like turning my nukes on myslef right about the time I saw the spell list for this level and telling Sony where they could go and how to amuse them self on the way there. I love playing my wizzy but I am SICK of seeing them get the shaft! How many other spell casting classes have pets, and we get this stupid familar that follows us around and annoys us all so bad we have to tell it to go away every time we zone. Its pathetic! All I ask for is fair treatment and I really don't think we are getting it with this spell or this level. Give me a break, as well they cram research down your freaking throat, and you do the combines till your blue in the face, and you get a spell like this that you can't even research. WHAT IS UP? I guess the joke is on me then. Bleh, some thing to the effect of take this game and shove it comes to mind to be honest. Ok I am sorry for the flaming for those of you who had to endure this but I really had to get it off my chest. Thank you for your support. $ony GIVE US A BREAK please!!!
▲ Page top
RE: GIVE ME A BREAK PLEASE SONY
QuoteReply
# May 02 2006 at 9:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966228402
194 posts
Lol. Calm down.
Most droppable 51-60 spells for ALL classes (except BSTs who didn't exist at the time) drop in Skyfire and Sebilis. Those spells were all added when the maximum level was raised from 50 to 60 (Kunark expansion) and when they were added, Skyfire and Sebilis, along with Charasis and Chardok, were the highest level zones in the game. So of course that's where they drop.

Edited, Tue May 2 22:22:36 2006
▲ Page top
I love this spell!
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2004 at 12:20 AM Rating: Decent
tubez
23 posts
This thing is great for solo kiting. Cast Atol's, then hit what ever mob with a nuke to make sure you have good aggro. Then cast Xuzl! The Sword doesn't get aggro and will keep hitting the mob forever or until Mr. Mobbie dies. Just keep the mob snared. When the mob gets to low hit points just sit and med, and watch you buddy kick the mob's **** for 35 to 73 HPs a smack! If you root the mob, Sword of Xuzl gets aggro and is dead ASAP BTW.

Enjoy
▲ Page top
not always useful
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2004 at 5:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263171429
4 posts
I don't konw about you, but when I cast this spell I watch how many time he hits and for how much. Most of the time this sword cannot even hit its target. I considered a waste of mana and stopped casting it. Anyone have any good reports about the average damage the sword does per mob. mine was 300, the battles just don't last long with a full group. But for kiting this is a plus.
▲ Page top
I LOVE THIS SPELL!!
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2004 at 8:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776413860
21 posts
I LOVE this spell!!

Tell your pet to go away so you can keep the buffs given by Flappy, and then cast this spell on mobs and sit back.

Often in LDON groups I cast this spell on the mob as soon as the tank engages, then I simply med up for a finishing nuke if I am low on mana, or scout with my EYE. You're not gonna be the hero of the day , but it's definately extra damage and the Only DOT spell we wizards have.
▲ Page top
dunno
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2004 at 9:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592259505468
36 posts
i dunno about givin my pet up for this =/
▲ Page top
RE: dunno
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2004 at 5:19 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592761552145
9 posts
There is no need to give up the benefits of your familiar to use the sword. tell your familiar to go away and youll notice that your familiar buff icon remains. You keep the benefits of your familiar withiout all that irritating flap, flap flap noise, and can now call a sword.

Updated
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2003 at 9:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966405780
Scholar
59 posts
I quote from the downloaded text from today's patch (December 18, 2003):

Quote:
Fixed a problem with short-duration pets (Rage of Zomm, cleric hammers, wizard flaming swords and such) so that they will no longer dissipate before engaging the target NPC.

QuoteReply
# May 20 2003 at 7:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760063884
174 posts
he most useful in a battle with mob that have alot of hp. u really cant use him for soloing because he taunts aggro onto himself. but in a good group and if u use him right hell last till the end of the fite. mostly use him on mobs that have around 10k+ hp other wise hes nto to useful. he has about maybe 150hp and he hits for around 40 i think.

Edited, Sat Jul 5 02:36:40 2003
▲ Page top
Flaming Sword
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2003 at 5:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781095087
2 posts
He can't backstab and disarm...he will last for the duration of the mob, unless another one has hit you, then he will attack that one. Also, he acts like a dot, so you have to make sure you have a mob targeted before you cast him
